title: Karm@liyth #3762
definition:
Carmelitess = see Carmel "garden-land"

 1) a female inhabitant of Carmel
 2) Abigail, the wife of David, who came from Carmel
nasbUsage:

 1) a female inhabitant of Carmel
 2) Abigail, the wife of David, who came from Carmel
